aliases: Bitexen Kripto Varlık Alım Satım Platformu AŞ
entity.summary: Turkey-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched on May 4, 2018 and operated from Istanbul's ITU ARI Teknokent ecosystem, continuing under the Bitexen brand within Turkey's transitional crypto-service-provider framework.
entity.notes: Official company material identifies a 2018 founding in Istanbul's ITU ARI Teknokent. An independent exchange profile supplies the exact May 4 launch date. Turkey's Capital Markets Board currently lists Bitexen on its transitional operating list, which the regulator explicitly states is not itself an authorisation.

expected.summary: Turkey-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Bitexen brand.

aliases: Bitexen Kripto Varlık Alım Satım Platformu AŞ
changes.summary: Turkey-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched on May 4, 2018 and operated from Istanbul's ITU ARI Teknokent ecosystem, continuing under the Bitexen brand within Turkey's transitional crypto-service-provider framework.
changes.notes: Official company material identifies a 2018 founding in Istanbul's ITU ARI Teknokent. An independent exchange profile supplies the exact May 4 launch date. Turkey's Capital Markets Board currently lists Bitexen on its transitional operating list, which the regulator explicitly states is not itself an authorisation.

events.title: Bitexen launched in Turkey
events.description: Bitexen launched as a Turkey-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange on May 4, 2018.
events.notes: The official company page establishes the 2018 founding and the independent exchange profile supplies the exact launch day.

events.title: Bitexen entered Turkey's transitional operating list
events.description: Turkey's Capital Markets Board included Bitexen among crypto-asset service providers that declared an intention to continue operating under the new statutory framework.
events.notes: The regulator explicitly states that appearance on the transitional list does not itself constitute authorisation.

evidence.title: About Bitexen
evidence.notes: Official company page describes Bitexen as founded in 2018 within Istanbul's ITU ARI Teknokent technology-development zone.

evidence.title: CoinMarketCap exchange reference for Bitexen
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile identifies May 4, 2018 as Bitexen's launch date and Istanbul, Turkey as its base.

evidence.title: Announcement regarding crypto-asset service providers
evidence.notes: Primary regulator announcement explains the transitional operating-list process following the July 2024 statutory changes.

evidence.title: Transitional list of operating crypto-asset service providers
evidence.notes: The current regulator list includes Bitexen Kripto Varlık Alım Satım Platformu AŞ and its former title Bitexen Teknoloji AŞ, while warning that list inclusion is not authorisation.

evidence.title: Bitexen official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Bitexen identity and active exchange interface.
